features: Rebuilt Dispatch/Admin Report Builder page using the generated command-center blueprint
Added KPI row for draft reports, ready to publish, published reports, total reports, photos included, and videos included
Added 4-step builder flow: Select Patrol, Select Proof, Build Report, Review & Publish
Added completed patrol/job selector with client, property, and patrol/job dropdowns
Added selected job summary card with property photo, client, property, patrol type, guard, date, time, and duration
Added guard-uploaded proof selector with photo/video cards, select-all, pagination, and items per page
Added live right-rail report preview with Co Pilot Security report paper layout
Added report options for template, title, guard notes, patrol summary, selected proof count, save draft, and review/publish
Added Save as Draft workflow using local report records when SQL fields are unavailable
Added Review & Publish workflow with confirmation when publishing without proof
Added preview export placeholder that downloads a text preview of the report
No URL input added; proof comes from guard-uploaded proof only
Preserved Proof Review Command Center and previous pages
